prompt: Show a page with a Dialog that has a 'Delete Account' trigger button, and an AlertDialog with a 'Reset Data' trigger button. The Dialog should have a title 'Delete your account' and a description. The AlertDialog should have a title 'Reset all data' and a description.

Dialog.title: Delete your account
Dialog.description: This action cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently removed.

AlertDialog.title: Reset all data
AlertDialog.description: Are you sure you want to reset all data to defaults?
